positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene. A stylized, repeating pattern of stylized forest elements: abstracted pine cones, perfect symmetrical ferns, clean hexagonal moss patches, and stylized sun rays forming radial symmetry. The composition should be centered and highly decorative, designed as a seamless textile repeat. Use a two-tone, limited color palette (e.g., forest emerald green, deep charcoal black, and off-white cream). Style: Nordic folk art meets modern geometric illustration. High contrast, clean lines, strong silhouettes, flat vector style, ultra-detailed yet graphic. Perfect for apparel print, vector artwork.
